events.description: ominous dark background pulse begins, red vignette edges
shield warning icon fades in with red glow
'THE SCARY PART' text slams in with spring scale — dramatic moment
malicious extension card slides up with puzzle icon, pulsing red glow
number '3' badge pops in with spring scale — three things counter
scene 1 fades out, scene 2 crossfades in — exfiltration view with code editor
code editor mockup panel slides in from left with placeholder code lines
remote server cloud icon fades in on right side
'EXFILTRATING CODE' label appears — data theft begins
10 data particles start flowing from editor to server — red and amber dots with glow trails
code lines in editor progressively highlight red as they are 'stolen'
file icon badge pops in — 'Every file you open'
keyboard icon badge pops in — 'Every keystroke you type'
'SILENTLY SENT' label fades in — data stream intensifies
'REMOTE SERVER' label appears under server icon — attacker destination revealed
scene 2 fades out, scene 3 crossfades in — sensitive data exposure
'YOUR DATA — EXPOSED' warning header slides in
proprietary code card fades in with code placeholder lines and 'STOLEN' badge
API keys card appears with fake key values — danger glow pulses, 'COMPROMISED' badge
environment variables card appears with DATABASE_URL and AWS_SECRET — danger glow, 'COMPROMISED' badge
bottom warning bar fades in — 'All of it — exfiltrated silently' with pulsing red glow
